title: Custom Webhook provider config
description: Configuration shape for the generic HMAC-signed JSON webhook provider. Escape hatch for tenants using Grafana / Grafana Cloud / New Relic / Slack directly / etc.

webhook_url.description: HTTPS endpoint. HTTP is refused (TLS required).

hmac_secret.description: Shared secret for HMAC-SHA256 signing. 32 chars minimum. Encrypted at rest.

signature_header.description: HTTP header carrying the HMAC signature.

timestamp_header.description: HTTP header carrying the signature timestamp (Unix seconds).

signature_tolerance_seconds.description: Signature timestamp tolerance window on the receiver side. Prevents replay attacks.

custom_headers.description: Optional additional headers on every dispatch. Useful for auth (Bearer token, API key). Values encrypted at rest.

payload_shape.description: Payload shape. 'canonical' = the full alert / incident JSON. 'slack_incoming_webhook' = Slack blocks format. 'grafana_webhook_v1' = Grafana Alerting webhook format. 'new_relic_events_api' = New Relic Custom Event format. 'custom' = tenant provides transform_expression.

transform_expression.description: Optional JSONata expression to transform the canonical payload before dispatch. Only used when payload_shape='custom'.

dispatch_on.description: Which events fire this webhook. Enables tenant to route specific events to specific webhooks (Slack for opens, PagerDuty for critical, ...).
